title: World stars
description: 15 questions about the most famous people

questions.question: Which singer released the album Midnights in 2022?
questions.explanation: Taylor Swift released the album Midnights in October 2022.

questions.question: Which footballer has the most Ballon d'Or awards?
questions.explanation: Lionel Messi has won 8 Ballon d'Or awards, more than anyone else.

questions.question: Who founded Tesla and SpaceX?
questions.explanation: Elon Musk is the CEO and co-founder of Tesla and SpaceX.

questions.question: Which actor played Jack in Titanic?
questions.explanation: Leonardo DiCaprio played Jack Dawson in the cult film Titanic (1997).

questions.question: What singer is known as Queen Bey?
questions.explanation: Beyoncé is often referred to as "Queen Bey" and is one of the most influential artists in the world.

questions.question: Who created the social network Facebook?
questions.explanation: Mark Zuckerberg created Facebook in 2004 while a student at Harvard University.

questions.question: Which scientist developed the theory of relativity?
questions.explanation: Albert Einstein published the general theory of relativity in 1915.

questions.question: Which artist sings the hit "Shape of You"?
questions.explanation: Ed Sheeran released "Shape of You" in 2017 and it is one of the most popular songs in the world.

questions.question: Who painted the Mona Lisa?
questions.explanation: Leonardo da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa around 1503-1519.

questions.question: Which Portuguese footballer is known as CR7?
questions.explanation: Cristiano Ronaldo is known as CR7 by his initials and shirt number.

questions.question: Which YouTuber and singer became famous with the song "Bad Guy"?
questions.explanation: Billie Eilish released the hit song "Bad Guy" in 2019 and won several Grammy Awards.

questions.question: Which basketball player is known by the nickname "King James"?
questions.explanation: LeBron James is called "King James" and is considered one of the best basketball players in history.

questions.question: Who is the Most Followed TikTok Creator (2024)?
questions.explanation: Khaby Lame has become the most popular creator on TikTok by number of followers.

questions.question: Which actress played Hermione Granger in the Harry Potter films?
questions.explanation: Emma Watson played Hermione Granger in all eight Harry Potter films.

questions.question: Which rapper legally changed his name to 'Ye' in 2021?
questions.explanation: Kanye West officially changed his name to Ye in 2021.
